sections.paragraph:
, קְדָם Ch. prop. the front part (Arab. قُدَّامُ); hence it becomes a prep.-

(1) before, i.q. Hebr. לְפְנֵי Dan 2:9, 10 , 11 3:13 , and frequently; used of time, Dan 7:7. Suffixes of the pl. form are added, as קֳדָמַיִךְ Dan 5:23 קֳדָמֹוהִי 4:5 קֳדָמֵיהֹון 4:4 (comp. Syr. ܩܕܳܡܰܝ). מִן־קֳדָם answers to the Heb. מִפְּנֵי, מֵעִם, and is put after verbs of taking, commanding, Dan 2:6, 15 6:27 5:24 , “the hand was stretched out מִן קֳדָמַי from before me,” von gegen mir über her.
